source_filing: JPMorgan Chase & Co. 10-K (CIK 19617), fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
original_text: JPMorganChase s credit spreads could widen or narrow not only due to events and circumstances that are specific to JPMorganChase but also as a result of general economic and geopolitical events and conditions.
modified_text: JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s credit spreads widen or narrow not only due to events and circumstances specific to the Firm but also as a result of general economic and geopolitical events and conditions.
claim: JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s credit spreads widen or narrow as a result of firm-specific events as well as general economic and geopolitical conditions.
citation_as_written: JPMorgan Chase & Co. 10-K, fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
notes: Source frames spread movement as a conditional possibility ('could widen or narrow'); report strips 'could' to flat present tense. Citation accurate; modality misrepresented.
